title: Exline's Awnings
description: This mod adds awnings to decorate with.
body:
[![Logo](https://img1.wsimg.com/isteam/ip/b3784fc8-73a8-4ed5-9033-feb6c6f2806c/blob-19e676c.png/:/rs=w:149,h:149,cg:true,m/cr=w:149,h:149/qt=q:95)](https://exlinemods.com/)

Explore Exline Mods for top-notch gaming accessories and mods. Elevate your gaming experience with our high-quality products. Visit exlinemods.com now to gear up and enhance your gameplay!

![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Y4u3I7q1/images/139e33fec224fb95031e1ab02c4b0e465b36f470.png)

This mod adds awnings to decorate with.
Place them over your doors or windows or however you like.
Crafted with planks or logs and sticks.
There are awnings for each type of plank and log.
